nonBlockingIssues.description: The patch script silently skips missing @enbox/agent targets instead of warning, so postinstall loses observability when target files are absent.
The runtime test coverage relies on a local simulated create() helper instead of exercising the real @enbox/agent stub-vault injection path and initialize() forwarding.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the mission patch-idempotence guidance so reviewers and workers know whether token-based patch detection is acceptable and whether missing-target skips must emit a warning.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The accepted patch-enbox-agent-vault-injection implementation passed review while using token-based detection and silent missing-target skips, but mission AGENTS.md currently requires a unique marker and warns on missing targets.

rejectedObservations.observation: Tighten the mobile-feature-worker skill because the reviewed worker implemented before writing failing tests.
